corrections.summary: Fixed citation: Axiom C5 → Axiom 1b for Cauchy slice conservation

keyResults: Multiplicity: C(O₁)>0 → complement has positive coherence (Thm 3.1)
No new dual required for composites (Thm 6.3)
C5 vacuous on pairs → ≥3 observers needed (Prop 7.1, Thm 7.2)
notes: Thm 2.1 proof uses informal bridging step ('disrupted coherence is lost') — physically compelling but not purely measure-theoretic
Cor 5.2 conflates coherence-independence with dynamical independence — interpretive step, clearly flagged in rigor assessment
Step 6 forward-references coherence-dual-pairs (which multiplicity enables) — mild circularity in citation

keyResults: Condition 2: π₁(SO(d)) finite iff d≥3; eliminates d=2 (Prop 3.1, Cor 3.2)
Condition 3: Exotic R⁴ smooth structures eliminate d=4 (Props 4.1-4.2, supplementary)
Condition 4: Orbital stability V_eff''(r₀) = (d-2)k/r₀^d·(4-d); eliminates d≥4 (Prop 5.2)
Convergence: d=3 is unique value passing all four conditions (Thm 6.1)
notes: Cor 3.2 forward-references interactions/bootstrap — not a true logical dependency since π₁ values are self-contained math
Prop 5.2 'iff d≤3' slightly misleading for d=2 (formula undefined there); d=2 handled by Cor 5.4 separately
